[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[project]
name = "pyfmridesign"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Design Matrix Construction for fMRI Analysis in Python"
readme = "README.md"
license = {text = "GPL-3.0-or-later"}
authors = [
    {name = "Bradley Buchsbaum", email = "brad.buchsbaum@gmail.com"},
]
maintainers = [
    {name = "Bradley Buchsbaum", email = "brad.buchsbaum@gmail.com"},
]
classifiers = [
    "Development Status :: 3 - Alpha",
    "Intended Audience :: Science/Research",
    "License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)",
    "Operating System :: OS Independent",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.9",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
    "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering :: Medical Science Apps.",
    "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering :: Information Analysis",
]
keywords = ["fMRI", "neuroimaging", "design matrix", "GLM", "neuroscience"]
requires-python = ">=3.9"
dependencies = [
    "numpy>=1.24.0",
    "scipy>=1.10.0",
    "pandas>=2.0.0",
    "pyfmrihrf>=0.1.0",
    "scikit-learn>=1.3.0",
    "statsmodels>=0.14.0",
    "patsy>=0.5.0",
    "plotly>=5.0.0",
    "matplotlib>=3.7.0",
    "rich>=13.0.0",
    "typing-extensions>=4.5.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=7.4.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.1.0",
    "pytest-xdist>=3.3.0",
    "black>=23.0.0",
    "ruff>=0.1.0",
    "mypy>=1.5.0",
    "pandas-stubs>=2.0.0",
    "types-setuptools",
    "pre-commit>=3.4.0",
]
docs = [
    "sphinx>=7.0.0",
    "sphinx-rtd-theme>=1.3.0",
    "sphinx-autodoc-typehints>=1.24.0",
    "nbsphinx>=0.9.0",
    "nbconvert<7",
    "lxml-html-clean",
    "myst-parser>=2.0.0",
    "numpydoc>=1.5.0",
]
test = [
    "pytest>=7.4.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.1.0",
    "pytest-xdist>=3.3.0",
    "hypothesis>=6.82.0",
    "pytest-benchmark>=4.0.0",
]
viz = [
    "plotly>=5.0.0",
    "matplotlib>=3.7.0",
    "seaborn>=0.12.0",
]

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/pyfmridesign"
Documentation = "https://pyfmridesign.readthedocs.io"
Repository = "https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/pyfmridesign"
"Bug Tracker" = "https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/pyfmridesign/issues"

[tool.hatch.version]
path = "src/pyfmridesign/__init__.py"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.sdist]
include = [
    "/src",
    "/tests",
    "/docs",
    "/examples",
    "README.md",
    "LICENSE",
    "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md",
    "FEATURE_PARITY.md",
]

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/pyfmridesign"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
minversion = "7.0"
addopts = [
    "-ra",
    "--strict-markers",
    "--strict-config",
    "--cov=pyfmridesign",
    "--cov-branch",
    "--cov-report=term-missing",
    "--cov-report=html",
    "--cov-report=xml",
]
testpaths = ["tests"]
pythonpath = ["src"]

[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["pyfmridesign"]
branch = true

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "def __repr__",
    "if self.debug:",
    "if __name__ == .__main__.:",
    "raise AssertionError",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
]

[tool.black]
line-length = 88
target-version = ['py39', 'py310', 'py311', 'py312']
include = '\.pyi?$'

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 88
target-version = "py39"
select = [
    "E",   # pycodestyle errors
    "W",   # pycodestyle warnings
    "F",   # pyflakes
    "I",   # isort
    "C90", # mccabe
    "N",   # pep8-naming
    "UP",  # pyupgrade
    "B",   # flake8-bugbear
    "A",   # flake8-builtins
    "C4",  # flake8-comprehensions
    "T10", # flake8-debugger
    "ICN", # flake8-import-conventions
    "PIE", # flake8-pie
    "T20", # flake8-print
    "Q",   # flake8-quotes
    "SIM", # flake8-simplify
    "TID", # flake8-tidy-imports
    "RUF", # Ruff-specific rules
]
ignore = [
    "E501", # line too long (handled by black)
    "B008", # do not perform function calls in argument defaults
    "C901", # too complex
    "N803", # argument name should be lowercase
    "N806", # variable in function should be lowercase
]

[tool.ruff.per-file-ignores]
"__init__.py" = ["F401", "F403"]
"tests/*" = ["S101"]

[tool.mypy]
python_version = "3.9"
strict = true
warn_return_any = true
warn_unused_configs = true
no_implicit_reexport = true
namespace_packages = true
show_error_codes = true
show_column_numbers = true
pretty = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = [
    "scipy.*",
    "sklearn.*",
    "statsmodels.*",
    "patsy.*",
    "plotly.*",
    "matplotlib.*",
    "pyfmrihrf.*",
]
ignore_missing_imports = true

[tool.numpydoc_validation]
checks = [
    "all",
    "ES01",  # extended summary
    "EX01",  # example section
    "SA01",  # see also section
    "GL01",  # docstring should start in the line immediately after quotes
    "GL02",  # closing quotes should be placed in the line after the last text
    "GL03",  # double line break found
]
exclude = [
    '\.__(init|repr|str)__$',
    '^test_',
]
